The overall mood should be playful, bratty, nostalgic, and street-fashion inspired. It should feel like a Y2K teen magazine layout mixed with graffiti poster design, idol concept styling, and scrapbook-like pop graphics.

title: A hyperrealistic 8K black and white extreme close-up port...
prompt_text: A hyperrealistic 8K black and white extreme close-up portrait of a young man's face, focusing tightly on his eye, cheekbone, and lips. Bright sunlight breaks into soft, wavy luminous lines that ripple across his skin like underwater reflections. The light flows diagonally, wrapping around the contours of his face in surreal patterns, while the shadows dissolve into smooth mid-gray tones instead of deep black. The skin is rendered in lifelike detail-visible pores, faint freckles, subtle stubble, and natural imperfections catch the glowing light realistically. The lips are softly highlighted, and the eye reflects fragments of the luminous waves, adding depth and emotion without artificial glow. The camera framing feels macro, pressed close to the face, with razor-thin depth of field: one illuminated ridge of skin is perfectly sharp, while the rest melts into velvety blur. The glassy, fluid quality of the light lines gives the portrait a surreal dreamlike aesthetic while remaining grounded in photographic realism. The background disappears into soft gray gradients, leaving only the interplay of skin texture and luminous wave-like rays. Fine cinematic grain overlays the frame, enhancing the tactile analog feel. The overall mood is intimate, surreal, and emotionally evocative - a monochrome portrait.

SCENE & COMPOSITION:
Background: A vibrant, solid orange-red backdrop. It should feature smooth, intense color gradients without any patterns, creating a “hot” atmosphere.

Framing: Medium close-up (focus on face and shoulders).

Palette: Dominated by vibrant orange and deep red hues.
Key Light: Strong, directional lighting that casts deep, dramatic shadows on the face (chiaroscuro effect), emphasizing facial structure.
Rim Light: A strong, dramatic edge light (or color cast) that separates the subject’s shoulders and head from the intensely lit background.
Mood: Mysterious, intense, high-contrast studio aesthetic.
TECHNICAL QUALITY:
Style: Photorealistic, highly detailed.
Texture: Sharp focus on the face, contrasting with the smooth gradients of the background.
Skin: Retain natural pores and texture.

title: Create an ultra-high resolution (8K) premium ASICS sports...
prompt_text:
Create an ultra-high resolution (8K) premium ASICS sportswear advertisement with a cinematic, editorial feel. The image should blend realistic performance photography with modern graphic design, suitable for global billboard and digital campaigns.

Core Direction

Speed, control, and precision.
Not chaos. Not exaggeration.
Everything should feel engineered and intentional.

Subject & Pose

A young athletic male (same face as reference) in a low sprint-start stance, grounded and powerful.

* one hand touching the ground
* front leg bent forward, back leg ready to drive
* torso slightly leaning forward
* head turned slightly upward, focused expression
* body angled diagonally to create depth

👉 This is a ready-to-explode moment, not mid-air.

Outfit (Colored – Refined)

* Jacket: deep teal performance windbreaker
    → lightweight, slight crinkle texture, subtle reflections
* Inner: textured burnt-orange performance tee
    → breathable mesh zones, sweat detail
* Bottom: matte black compression tights
    → minimal ASICS graphic lines
* Socks: white crew with small ASICS logo

Keep it color-blocked but controlled, not flashy.

Hero Product (Main Focus)

ASICS running shoes (white base + orange accents)

* ultra-detailed engineered mesh
* visible GEL cushioning with depth
* realistic sole texture + slight dirt contact
* crisp branding

Perspective:

* front shoe dominant but realistic scale
* sharpest focus in entire frame
* subtle reflection on wet ground

Environment

* dark industrial / tunnel-like setting
* wet reflective ground surface
* background slightly blurred for depth
* orange light streaks or glow behind subject

Lighting

* strong directional key light (front/side)
* warm orange rim light from behind
* subtle reflections on wet ground
* controlled highlights (no blown whites)
* slight shadow gradient for depth

Graphic Design Layer

Keep it premium, not overloaded:

Typography:

* large bold text on left:
    “RUN FASTER”
  → “RUN” in white, “FASTER” in orange
  → slightly textured, partially blended

Micro UI (minimal):

* Velocity: 28 km/h
* Energy Return: 92%
* Impact: High

Use thin, subtle futuristic fonts.

Branding:

* ASICS logo top corner
* small tagline: “Sound Mind, Sound Body”

Ground Interaction

* light water splash + dust mix under shoe
* subtle particles, not exaggerated
* realistic contact shadow

Camera & Lens

* 35–50mm lens
* low angle but controlled
* shallow depth of field
* slight motion blur on background edges
* crisp subject + product

Color System

* primary: teal + orange
* secondary: black, white
* slightly desaturated for premium feel
* maintain contrast without oversaturation

Final Feel

* looks like a real photoshoot, not CGI
* product-first hierarchy
* clean, premium, high-performance
